title: monetdbd crash while creating & loading database
bug_features_seed:
CREATE TABLE `data` (
	`col1` CHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL,
	`col2` CHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL,
	`col3` TIMESTAMP DEFAULT NULL,
	`col4` CHAR(1) DEFAULT NULL,
	`col5` INT DEFAULT NULL,
	`col6` INT DEFAULT NULL,
	`col7` INT DEFAULT NULL,
	`col8` INT DEFAULT NULL,
	`col9` CHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL
);
INSERT INTO `data` (`col1`, `col2`, `col3`, `col4`, `col5`, `col6`, `col7`, `col8`, `col9`) VALUES ('boundary', NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT * FROM `data` WHERE `col5` IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE `data` SET `col5` = `col6` + 1 WHERE `col6` IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Creating and loading database with specific table structure
